Student.title: Student
Student.description: Represents a student in the school's reward system.

firstName.description: The first name of the student.

middleName.description: The middle name of the student.

lastName.description: The last name of the student.

nfcId.description: The student's unique ID for NFC/barcode scanning.

lifetimePoints.description: The total points ever earned by the student.

classId.description: Reference to the student's assigned Class.

categoryPoints.description: A map of points earned per category, where keys are category names and values are points.

teacherIds.description: A list of teacher IDs assigned to the student.

name.description: The full name of the teacher.

Class.title: Class
Class.description: Represents a class or grade level.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Defines a classification for coupon types.

points.description: The default point value for this category.

id.description: The unique code of the coupon.

used.description: Whether the coupon has been redeemed.

usedBy.description: Name of the student who redeemed it.

RewardItem.title: RewardItem
RewardItem.description: Represents an item available in the rewards shop.

points.description: The point cost of the item.

icon.description: The name of a Lucide icon for display.

addedBy.description: Name of the admin who added the prize.

teacherId.description: ID of the teacher who owns this prize. If empty, it is a school-wide prize.

classId.description: ID of the class this prize is restricted to. If empty, it is not restricted by class.

StudentActivity.title: StudentActivity
StudentActivity.description: A log entry for a student's point activity.

/schools/{schoolId}/students/{studentId}.description: Student profiles for a specific school. The document ID is the student's unique scannable ID.
Activity log for a specific student.

/schools/{schoolId}/teachers/{teacherId}.description: Teacher profiles for a specific school.

/schools/{schoolId}/classes/{classId}.description: Class definitions for a specific school.

/schools/{schoolId}/categories/{category.description: Coupon category definitions for a specific school.

/schools/{schoolId}/coupons/{couponId}.description: Generated coupons for a specific school.

/schools/{schoolId}/prizes/{rewardItemId.description: Reward items available in the shop for a specific school.

/schools/{schoolId}/roles_admin/{adminUi.description: Grants admin privileges for a school to a specific UID.
